title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
description:
**About Bazaarvoice**
 At Bazaarvoice, we create smart shopping experiences. Through our expansive global network, product\\-passionate community \\& enterprise technology, we connect thousands of brands and retailers with billions of consumers. Our solutions enable brands to connect with consumers and collect valuable user\\-generated content, at an unprecedented scale. This content achieves global reach by leveraging our extensive and ever\\-expanding retail, social \\& search syndication network. And we make it easy for brands \\& retailers to gain valuable business insights from real\\-time consumer feedback with intuitive tools and dashboards. The result is smarter shopping: loyal customers, increased sales, and improved products.
   

  

 The problem we are trying to solve : Brands and retailers struggle to make real connections with consumers. It's a challenge to deliver trustworthy and inspiring content in the moments that matter most during the discovery and purchase cycle. The result? Time and money spent on content that doesn't attract new consumers, convert them, or earn their long\\-term loyalty.
   

  

 Our brand promise : closing the gap between brands and consumers.
   

  

 Founded in 2005, Bazaarvoice is headquartered in Austin, Texas with offices in North America, Europe, Asia and Australia.
   

  

 It’s official: Bazaarvoice is a Great Place to Work in the US , Australia, India, Lithuania, France, Germany and the UK!
   

  

**About Team**
 Bazaarvoice is looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join us in building the future of product discovery. As part of the Content and Creators product unit, you’ll be part of a team building products used by millions of consumers and thousands of businesses worldwide.
   

  

 If you’re looking for an opportunity to work alongside many other smart, passionate people on exciting product and technology challenges, keep reading.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
 We are interested in software developers who are hands\\-on and willing to dig into tough problems. We love people who are willing to explore new areas, learn quickly, and apply their skills to challenging design issues. We want you to be a spark bringing energy, passion and creativity to work every day.
   

  

 We are looking for Senior Software Engineers at Bazaarvoice own complex software features from concept on to delivery, conceive and drive new ideas. Engineers who can collaborate with Product Managers, Product Designers, and other Software Engineers to deliver new functionality and iterative improvements to member\\-facing products and internal tools.
   

  

**The Must Have Skills That Matter**
* 5\\+ years of overall experience
* Understanding about AWS \\- EC2, S3, RDS etc
* Understanding about Elastic search.
* Extensive experience building and refactoring Scala applications ( or willing to learn scala and contribute)
* Good work experience with Message Queue \\- Kafka, Rabbit MQ, etc
* Understanding of Agile or Kanban / Lean so ware development methodologies\\- Experience using modern build tools such as Maven, Jenkins, Github, etc. a plus
* Familiarity No\\-sql experience ( dynamo , mongo , Cassandra etc. )


**Why You’ll Love Working with Us?**
* Work with cutting\\-edge technology in a collaborative, global team
* Competitive salary \\+ good benefits (insurance, annual leave, bonuses, referral rewards, and more).
* We’re Great Place to Work Certified (3 years in a row!).
* Hybrid work model (3 days in office – Prestige Pacific Tech, Kadubeesanahalli).


**Interview Process**
**Hiring Manager Meeting:** 
 Team, values \\& culture check.
   

  

**Tech Round 1:** 
 Coding round with the team
   

  

**Tech Round 2:** 
 System design Round.
   

  

**Final Round:** 
 Chat with HR/Senior Leadership.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Group Health Insurance, Group Personal Accident, Group Term Life.
* Paid Time Off options, including Annual Leaves, Casual Leave and declared holidays.
* Annual Performance Bonus and Sales Incentive for eligible positions.
* Referral bonus program.


 Why join Bazaarvoice?
   

  

 Customer is key
   

  

 We see our own success through our customers’ outcomes.
   

  

 We approach every situation with a customer first mindset.
   

  

 Transparency \\& Integrity Builds Trust
   

  

 We believe in the power of authentic feedback because it’s in our DNA.
   

  

 We do the right thing when faced with hard choices. Transparency and trust accelerate our collective performance.
   

  

 Passionate Pursuit of Performance
   

  

 Our energy is contagious, because we hire for passion, drive \\& curiosity.
   

  

 We love what we do, and because we’re laser focused on our mission.
   

  

 Innovation over Imitation
   

  

 We seek to innovate as we are not content with the status quo.
   

  

 We embrace agility and experimentation as an advantage.
   

  

 Stronger Together
   

  

 We bring our whole selves to the mission and find value in diverse perspectives.
   

  

 We champion what’s best for Bazaarvoice before individuals or teams.
   

  

 As a stronger company we build a stronger community.
   

  

 Commitment to diversity and inclusion
   

  

 Bazaarvoice provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all team members and applicants according to their experience, talent, and qualifications for the job without regard to race, color, national origin, religion, age, disability, sex (including pregnancy, gender stereotyping, and marital status), sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information, military/veteran status, or any other category protected by federal, state, or local law in every location in which the company has facilities. Bazaarvoice believes that diversity and an inclusive company culture are key drivers of creativity, innovation and performance. Furthermore, a diverse workforce and the maintenance of an atmosphere that welcomes versatile perspectives will enhance our ability to fulfill our vision of creating the world’s smartest network of consumers, brands, and retailers.
   

  

**As part of our hiring process, a background check will be conducted. This will be done with your consent and will only include information relevant to the job.**
 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Python Question & Answer Reviewer
description:
**Job Title: Python QSA Reviewer (Masters/PhD\\-Level – Computer Science)** 




  





**Contract \\- 3 months (Remote)** 




  





**Role Overview**




 We are looking for a highly skilled Computer Science expert to review advanced Python\\-based
 



 coding Questions \\& Solutions (QSAs) designed for Masters and PhD\\-level assessments. The reviewer
 



 will be responsible for validating correctness, depth, rigor, edge\\-case coverage, computational efficiency,
 



 and research\\-level reasoning.
 



 This role requires strong theoretical foundations, advanced algorithmic expertise, and the ability to
 



 critically evaluate solutions from both academic and systems perspectives.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Review and validate advanced Computer Science coding questions and answers written in



 Python.
 


* Evaluate correctness, optimality, and completeness of solutions.
* Verify formal reasoning, complexity analysis, and proof\\-style justifications.
* Identify logical gaps, incorrect assumptions, hidden edge cases, and scalability issues.
* Assess code quality, readability, architectural design, and performance tradeoffs
* Ensure solutions align with Masters/PhD\\-level academic standards.
* Review pseudocode tied to research papers and validate implementation fidelity.
* Provide structured, actionable feedback to content creators.



  





**Required Technical Expertise**




 1\\. Core Computer Science Foundations
 



 2\\. Advanced Algorithms \\& Data Structures
 



 3\\. Software Engineering \\& Code Rigor
 



 4\\. Programming Paradigm Fluency
 



 5\\. Systems \\& Distributed Computing
 



 6\\. Research\\-Level Competency (PhD\\-Level Review)

title: Unity 3D Developer
description:
**Company Description**

* Our solutions leverage
 **Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR), Mixed Reality (MR), AI\\-driven analytics, and immersive 3D environments**

 **defence, healthcare, manufacturing, and enterprise sectors** 
 .
* We design and develop
 **high\\-fidelity simulation systems, digital twins, immersive training modules, and operational visualization platforms** 
 that enable organizations to improve decision\\-making, training effectiveness, and operational efficiency.
* Our vision is to seamlessly integrate
 **physical and digital environments** 
 to build intelligent simulation systems that enhance learning, preparedness, and operational readiness.
* Join us to
 **innovate, build cutting\\-edge simulation systems, and shape the future of immersive technology applications across critical industries.**



  





**Role Description** 



* This is a
 **full\\-time on\\-site role for a Unity XR Developer** 
 located in
 **Gurugram** 
 .
* The Unity XR Developer will be responsible for
 **designing, developing, and optimizing immersive simulation applications using Unity** 
 . These applications will support
 **training, operational visualization, and simulation use cases** 
 across industries such as
 **defence, healthcare, and manufacturing** 
 .
* Responsibilities include development of
 **VR/AR applications, real\\-time 3D simulations, interactive training modules, and immersive visualization systems**

* The role also requires
 **collaboration with designers, artists, hardware engineers, and AI teams** 
 to deliver high\\-quality immersive simulation solutions.



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Act as a bridge between
 **3D artists, simulation designers, and software developers** 
 , facilitating communication and asset pipeline between development and art teams.
* Participate in
 **technical design discussions and project planning meetings** 
 to review development progress, identify technical challenges, and propose innovative solutions.
* Review
 **simulation design documents and technical specifications** 
 to determine the architecture and technical requirements of XR simulation systems.
* Design, develop, and optimize
 **interactive simulation applications and immersive XR experiences**

 **PC, mobile, VR headsets, and AR/MR devices** 
 .
* Develop
 **real\\-time training environments and operational simulations** 
 for sectors such as
 **defence, healthcare, manufacturing, and industrial operations** 
 .
* Integrate
 **haptic feedback systems** 
 such as gloves, vests, or specialized hardware into simulation environments using available SDKs and APIs.
* Collaborate with hardware and electronics teams to
 **fine\\-tune tactile feedback and interaction systems** 
 for training and simulation applications.
* Troubleshoot issues related to
 **device compatibility, performance optimization, and synchronization between visual, physical, and haptic systems** 
 .
* Research, define, maintain, and improve
 **development workflows, content pipelines, and technical frameworks**

* Develop
 **tools and frameworks that enable artists and designers to efficiently integrate assets into simulation environments** 
 .
* Implement
 **interactive mechanics, simulation logic, UI/UX systems, and visualization tools**

* Collaborate with backend developers to
 **integrate real\\-time simulation data with server\\-side systems, analytics platforms, and databases** 
 .
* Support prototyping teams in developing
 **mockups, wireframes, and interactive prototypes** 
 for simulation platforms.
* Communicate development progress, technical challenges, and deliverables clearly to internal teams and stakeholders.
* Collaborate with
 **external partners, research institutions, and enterprise clients** 
 to understand requirements and deliver high\\-quality simulation solutions.
* Participate in
 **innovation discussions and R\\&D initiatives** 
 to explore new technologies in XR, AI, and immersive simulation.
* Contribute to the development of
 **internal SDKs, tools, libraries, and reusable frameworks** 
 to streamline simulation development processes.
* Respond constructively to feedback and
 **refine solutions to meet client and project requirements** 
 .
* Create
 **technical documentation and specification sheets** 
 to support development and integration efforts.
* Test new tools, plugins, and frameworks before deployment into production environments.
* Track and report bugs, manage issue logs, and help prioritize development improvements.



  





**Qualification Criteria** 



* Minimum
 **3\\+ years of hands\\-on experience as a Unity Developer**

* Strong experience developing
 **interactive applications using Unity Engine** 
 , preferably with projects related to simulation, XR, or visualization.
* Proficiency in
 **C\\# programming and object\\-oriented design principles** 
 .
* Experience working with

* Familiarity with

* Strong understanding of

* Understanding of

* Experience using

 and collaborative development workflows.

* Interest in

title: ServiceNow CMDB Developer
description:
**Job Title : ServiceNow CMDB Developer** 




**Experience : 6\\+ years (Mandatory)** 




**Location : Hyderabad/ Noida** 




**Notice Period : Immediate to 30 Days Preferred** 




**Shift: 2 PM to 10 PM** 




  





**Role:** 




 We are seeking a skilled CMDB Developer with 4–6 years of hands\\-on experience in Configuration Management Database (CMDB) development and IT Service Management (ITSM). The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in CMDB data modeling, integrations, data quality, and reconciliation, and will work closely with cross\\-functional IT teams to ensure the accuracy, integrity, and governance of configuration data supporting enterprise services.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop, configure, and maintain CMDB solutions aligned with ITIL and organizational standards.
* Define and manage CI classes, attributes, relationships, and lifecycle workflows within the CMDB.
* Develop and customize CMDB data models to support business services and infrastructure components.
* Build and maintain integrations between CMDB and discovery tools, monitoring systems, asset management, and third\\-party applications.
* Implement data normalization, reconciliation, and de\\-duplication rules to ensure CMDB data accuracy and integrity.
* Monitor CMDB health, perform regular audits, and drive continuous data quality improvements.
